task: Detect the language of each line in /tmp/clive/multilang.txt based on common patterns (character sets, stop words). Write the detected language per line to /tmp/clive/result.txt.

initial_state.setup: echo 'Good morning, how are you today?' > /tmp/clive/multilang.txt && echo 'Guten Morgen, wie geht es Ihnen?' >> /tmp/clive/multilang.txt && echo 'Bonjour, comment allez-vous?' >> /tmp/clive/multilang.txt && echo 'Buenos días, ¿cómo está usted?' >> /tmp/clive/multilang.txt

task: Extract all translatable strings from /tmp/clive/app.py (strings in gettext calls like _('...') or gettext('...')). Write them to /tmp/clive/result.txt, one per line.

initial_state.setup:
cat > /tmp/clive/app.py << 'PY'
from gettext import gettext as _

def login_page():
    title = _('Welcome back')
    prompt = _('Enter your email address')
    button = _('Sign In')
    footer = _('Forgot your password?')
    version = 'v2.0'  # not translatable
PY

success_criteria.check: grep -q 'Welcome back' /tmp/clive/result.txt && grep -q 'Sign In' /tmp/clive/result.txt && test $(wc -l < /tmp/clive/result.txt | tr -d ' ') -eq 4

task: Generate a PO translation file at /tmp/clive/messages.po for German translations. Include the 4 strings from /tmp/clive/strings.txt with German translations. Follow standard PO file format with headers.

initial_state.setup: echo 'Welcome back' > /tmp/clive/strings.txt && echo 'Enter your email address' >> /tmp/clive/strings.txt && echo 'Sign In' >> /tmp/clive/strings.txt && echo 'Forgot your password?' >> /tmp/clive/strings.txt

task: Create an i18n JSON file at /tmp/clive/de.json with German translations for UI strings. Read the English source from /tmp/clive/en.json and produce the German equivalent. Write the JSON to /tmp/clive/result.json.

initial_state.setup: echo '{"nav.home":"Home","nav.about":"About Us","nav.contact":"Contact","footer.copyright":"All rights reserved","form.submit":"Submit","form.cancel":"Cancel","error.required":"This field is required","error.email":"Please enter a valid email"}' > /tmp/clive/en.json

success_criteria.check: python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open('/tmp/clive/result.json')); assert len(d)==8; assert 'nav.home' in d"

task: Format data according to German locale conventions. Given: number 1234567.89, date 2026-04-09, currency 3115.42 EUR. Write formatted versions (1.234.567,89 / 09.04.2026 / 3.115,42 €) to /tmp/clive/result.txt.
